nasb.text: Who is the man who fears the Lord? He will instruct him in the way he should choose.

esv.text: Who is the man who fears the Lord? Him will he instruct in the way that he should choose.

cnv.text: 誰是那敬畏耶和華的人？ 耶和華必指示他應選擇的道路。

ccb.text: 凡敬畏耶和华的人， 耶和华必指示他当走的路。

csbs.text: 谁是那敬畏耶和华的人呢？ 耶和华必指示他当选择的道路。
